scripts.mcp:figma:http:start: zsh -lc 'mkdir -p logs; source ./scripts/ops/load_env.zsh; node mcp/figma-server-http.js 1>>logs/figma.stdout 2>>logs/figma.stderr & echo $! > logs/figma.pid'
scripts.mcp:figma:http:status: bash -lc 'PID=$(cat logs/figma.pid 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PID" ] && kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then echo RUNNING:$PID; else echo STOPPED; fi; lsof -nP -iTCP:3845 -sTCP:LISTEN || true; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "HEALTH_%{http_code}\n" http://127.0.0.1:3845/health || echo HEALTH_000'
scripts.mcp:figma:http:stop: bash -lc 'PID=$(cat logs/figma.pid 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$PID" ] && kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f logs/figma.pid'
